title: BSNL JTO Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 100 Junior Telecom Officer Posts
short_info: Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited (BSNL), a Government of India Enterprise, has released an official advertisement for 100 posts of Junior Telecom Officer – Direct Recruitment (Telecom) [JTO(T)-DR] from the open market.

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid through online mode only (Internet Banking, Credit Card, Debit Card) on the BSNL website: www.externalexam.bsnl.co.in. Fee once paid is non-refundable.

age_limit.details: General Age Limit: Minimum 20 years and maximum 30 years as on the closing date of receipt of application.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications specified for the Telecom stream: | Core Qualification (Telecom Stream): Bachelor of Engineering Degree or equivalent from a Central Govt./State Govt. recognized Institution/University in any of the following disciplines: Telecommunications, Electronics, Radio, Computer, Electrical, Information Technology (IT), or Instrumentation. Alternative Qualification: M.Sc. (Electronics) or M.Sc. (Computer Science). Higher Qualifications: Candidates possessing M.Tech. in the prescribed disciplines are also eligible to appear in the Direct Recruitment examination. Vision Requirement: The applicant must be capable of distinguishing principal colours and should have binocular vision. Nationality: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply.

salary_details.pay scale: IDA Pay Scale [E-1] of ₹16,400 – ₹40,500/- (2nd PRC pay scale w.e.f. 01.01.2007)
salary_details.bond: ₹6 Lakhs bond to serve BSNL for a minimum of 5 years from date of appointment
salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding the vacancy package include: | *Reservation as per Central Govt. guidelines applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/EWS/Ex-Serviceman candidates.

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the online registration process as follows:
Visit the BSNL official examination website: www.externalexam.bsnl.co.in and register online only. No manual/paper applications will be entertained.

Keep the following ready before registering: valid mobile number and email ID (for OTP), scanned passport size colour photograph (jpg/jpeg, 20–50 kb, white background), scanned signature (jpg/jpeg, 10–20 kb), Class 10th Certificate (date of birth proof), Degree Certificate and consolidated marksheet, photo identity proof (Aadhaar/Passport/Driving License/Voter ID), valid category/reservation certificate as applicable, and Medical Certificate for PwBD candidates.
Pay the requisite non-refundable examination fee online through Internet Banking, Credit Card, or Debit Card.
